title: qlt's 3D Blocks
description: Changes some of the regular 2D minecraft blocks to 3D style
body:
# qlt’s 3D Blocks

**qlt’s 3D Blocks** is a lightweight, client-side resource pack that enhances Minecraft’s visuals by converting select flat block textures into detailed 3D models. 

## Key Features:

3D Block Models: Converts selected flat block textures into detailed 3D models

1. Vanilla-Friendly Design: Maintains the original Minecraft style
2. Minimal & Lightweight: Only modifies specific blocks; the rest of the game remains unchanged.
3. Compatible with Any Pack: Works alongside most other texture packs without conflicts.

## Installation Instructions:

1. Download the qlt’s 3D Blocks zip.

2. Move the qlt’s 3D Blocks folder into your Minecraft resourcepacks directory.
> Windows: %appdata%.minecraft\resourcepacks
> macOS: ~/Library/Application Support/minecraft/resourcepacks

3. Launch Minecraft, go to Options → Resource Packs, and enable qlt’s 3D Blocks.

Place it above other resource packs if needed to ensure the models appear correctly.

## Notes:

Fully client-side; no server mods required.
Works on all supported Minecraft versions (1.20+ recommended).
Ideal for players who want subtle visual upgrades while keeping the vanilla Minecraft experience intact.
3D Hanging Signs only work with Optifine Mod installed.
